description_long: This object is a rectangular medicine box with a predominantly teal and white color scheme. The front face displays Chinese characters and a circular OTC symbol, while the back features English text identifying the product as 'WULING CAPSULE' and describing its functions. The box is made of printed cardboard and is likely to contain blister packs or capsules inside, as indicated by the dosage form. The sides of the box are plain with some additional text and barcodes. The overall appearance is clean, professional, and typical of over-the-counter pharmaceutical packaging. The box is compact and lightweight, suitable for easy handling and storage.
description: A teal and white rectangular medicine box labeled 'WULING CAPSULE' with both Chinese and English text, made of cardboard and designed for over-the-counter use.
description_view_0: Front view shows Chinese product name, OTC symbol, and manufacturer details on a teal and white background.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the box's thickness and some vertical text, with minimal design elements.
description_view_2: Back view displays the English product name 'WULING CAPSULE', description, and manufacturer information.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the product name in Chinese and the OTC symbol, similar to the other side.
attribute_label_text: 乌灵胶囊 规格:每粒装0.33g 每盒装24粒 浙江佐力药业股份有限公司 OTC JOLLY WULING CAPSULE TONIFYING KIDNEY AND STRENGTHENING BRAIN REFRESHING SPIRIT AND TRANQUILIZATION ZHEJIANG JOLLY PHARMACEUTICAL CO., LTD. Major Functions: Nourishing the kidney, strengthening the brain, calming the mind, tranquilizing and allaying excitement. Used for insomnia, forgetfulness, dizziness, tinnitus, and spermatorrhea, especially for those with kidney deficiency. [illegible]
